method_description: The privacy policy and FAQ link to a native opt-out page at /svc/optout/search/contact_optouts. Per the FAQ, the opt-out flow is: (1) search by first/last name + state, (2) select matching record, (3) enter a disposable email address + complete CAPTCHA, (4) receive verification email and click confirmation link, (5) record removed within 24-72 hours. The opt-out page is behind a Cloudflare Turnstile managed challenge (403), so the form itself could not be loaded or tested. The footer 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' link points to beenverified.com/app/optout/contact-search (cross-domain, hardcoded in footer HTML with data-ga-label='Opt out'). The ToS (Section 4) links opt-out to the 'Opt-out page' without specifying a URL. The ToS identifies PeopleSmart LLC as the operating entity; the privacy policy identifies 'The Lifetime Value Co. LLC acting through PeopleSmart LLC'. BeenVerified is not mentioned in either the ToS or the privacy policy. The footer Affiliates link has data-ga-label='Affiliates (BV)' and the Careers link goes to ltvco.com, suggesting a corporate relationship, but no official documentation on the site confirms BeenVerified ownership.
bot_check: Cloudflare Turnstile managed challenge on the opt-out page (/svc/optout/search/contact_optouts) — confirmed. Returns 403 with 'Just a moment...' interstitial that never resolves in automated browsers (tested over 60 seconds with 12 retry attempts). This is Cloudflare Turnstile, NOT reCAPTCHA. The FAQ also references a CAPTCHA in the opt-out form itself ('complete the CAPTCHA'), but the type could not be confirmed because the Turnstile gate blocks access to the form.

tier_1.failure_cause: Requires inbox access to complete verification

notes: Primary failure: The FAQ explicitly states the opt-out requires email verification — 'verify your request to opt out by clicking on the link in our verification email'. This requires inbox access and fails Tier 1. Additional concerns: (1) The opt-out page is blocked by Cloudflare Turnstile (not reCAPTCHA), preventing even loading the form. PIR only supports reCAPTCHA/reCAPTCHA Enterprise. (2) The homepage search is B2B-oriented (name + company + job title), not name + city + state. However, the ToS Section 1 describes PeopleSmart as serving personal use cases ('reconnect with long-lost friends or relatives, learn about backgrounds of neighbors, online dates') — so the site is not exclusively B2B despite homepage framing. The People Search capability may be behind the subscriber paywall. (3) The footer 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' link is hardcoded to beenverified.com/app/optout/contact-search (cross-domain). This URL is also blocked by Cloudflare Turnstile. The corporate relationship between PeopleSmart and BeenVerified is suggested by footer metadata (data-ga-label='Affiliates (BV)', Careers link to ltvco.com) but is NOT documented in the ToS or privacy policy. The ToS identifies the entity as PeopleSmart LLC; the privacy policy says 'The Lifetime Value Co. LLC acting through PeopleSmart LLC'. (4) Only one record can be opted out at a time through the online process — additional records require emailing privacy@PeopleSmart.com. (5) California flow could not be compared because the opt-out page was inaccessible behind Cloudflare. (6) Profile search was not attempted on the opt-out page due to the Cloudflare block. The homepage B2B search (name + company) does not match PIR's search model (name + city + state).
